# Simple, scalable pricing for your social platform
Our MAU-based pricing is designed to scale to your needs, with volume-based discounts, the more you grow, the more you save.
## social.plus Suite
The complete toolkit to build social experiences and drive in-app growth.
### What's included:
Full access to all features
UIKit & pre-built components
Content moderation tools
Complete SDK & API access
Comprehensive engagement analytics
Standard technical support
Add-ons

Enterprise-grade AI analytics to uncover trends, identify opportunities, and drive confident, data-backed decisions.
### AI Content Moderation
Advanced AI moderation to detect harmful content, reduce risk, and keep your community safe and compliant.

pages.metaTitle: Social SDK | Build Social Features with API-based Social SDKs
pages.metaDescription: Ready-to-use feeds, groups and forums, stories, user profiles, and more customizable white-label social media features.
pages.content:
# Build your in-app community faster with a Social SDK
Build a social ecosystem effortlessly with our enterprise-ready SDKs, designed for seamless scalability and integration across all platforms.
Activity Feeds
## Deliver content that matters with personalized activity feeds
By adding Feeds to your app, users can access relevant updates via algorithmically ranked content and engage with likes and comments.
Groups and Forums
## Unite your community with groups & forums
Harness the power of communities within your app with Groups & Forums, allowing users to share their thoughts and engage with each other.
PROFILES
## Let users express themselves with personal profiles
Empower users to showcase their personalities and connect with others through personalized profiles that highlight their interests and foster meaningful relationships.
STORIES
## Capture & share every moment with stories
Allow users to share video and image stories, popularized by all the major social apps, and share life’s best moments as they happen on your platform.
## The most feature rich social SDK available
With social.plus, you can get up and running quickly with all the features of an engaging social platform.
## Leading brands grow with social.plus
Discover how hundreds of companies use social.plus to accelerate app growth and unlock new revenue streams
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus enables you to quickly add white-label social features to your app or website with our ready-to-use SDKs and APIs.
Chat SDK
### Turn connections into conversations
Elevate your app’s social experience with chat that keeps users talking, sharing, and building connections in real time.
Video SDK
### Bring moments to life with video
From live streams to social commerce, bring immersive video experiences straight to your app. Let users step inside the moment.

pages.metaTitle: Social UI Kit | Pre-built UIKit for iOS, Android, Flutter and React
pages.metaDescription: Integrate social media features into apps with ready-to-use UIKits and UI components.
pages.content:
# Save time with ready-to-use UIKits
Our white-label social network UIKit includes user interfaces and components to seamlessly integrate social media features into applications, and can be fully customized to meet your app's unique requirements.
## Open Source Social UIKits
You can fork our UIKit source code to gain complete control over the visual style of the social media features in your app. Customize targeted UX flows, specific views, and respond to user interactions to tailor the user experience specifically for your application.
## Figma Social UI Kit
Access the white-label Figma social media UI Kit for iOS, Android and Web. Modify all components, colors, fonts, icons, and layouts with ease, ensuring the UI perfectly complements your app's style and functionality.
First name
Last name
Business email
By clicking 'Access Figma UI Kit,' you allow social.plus to process and store your information for contact purposes and agree to the Privacy Policy.

pages.content:
# Build in-app messaging faster with a Chat SDK
Accelerate development with pre-built chat features that you can easily customize to meet your app's unique requirements. Get started with social.plus Chat SDK and Chat API.
Social Chat
## Harness the power of communication with in-app chats
Effortlessly embed messaging and connect your users with social.plus Chat SDK to power your messaging services and increase real-time engagement.
Live Chat
## Increase user engagement in real-time with live chat
Our ready-to-use SDK and Chat API provide everything you need to create a Live Chat Overlay for live streams in your app so that you can focus on creating great user experience.
BROADCAST CHAT
## Deliver vital messages to all users with broadcasts
Easily reach your entire user base with important updates such as announcements and promotions through broadcast chat channels.
## All the messaging features your app needs
With social.plus, you can build messaging in your app with all the features of an instant messaging platform.
## Leading brands grow with social.plus
Discover how hundreds of companies use social.plus to accelerate app growth and unlock new revenue streams
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus enables you to quickly add white-label social features to your app or website with our ready-to-use SDKs and APIs.
Social SDK
### Build a community that thrives
Create spaces where users connect, share, and engage effortlessly. Scalable, seamless, ready for any social use case.
Video SDK
### Bring moments to life with video
From live streams to social commerce, bring immersive video experiences straight to your app. Let users step inside the moment.

pages.metaTitle: Live Analytics & AI Insights | social.plus
pages.metaDescription: Real-time analytics and AI-driven insights, empowering you to boost average revenue per app user.
pages.content:
# Maximize growth with live analytics & AI Insights
Leverage powerful AI tools to get to know your users like never before and make informed business decisions.
## Take your data analysis to new heights with powerful AI tools
Our easy-to-use dashboard allows you to analyze your first-party data in real-time and access AI-powered Insights and recommendations to drive your business strategy.
Topic Analysis
### See what users are talking about
Access all the real-time data you need to effectively shape your user engagement strategies:
Discover trending topics posted by users
Track volume and frequency of posts
Easily identify and predict trends
Sentiment Analysis
### Track user emotions in real-time
Understand how your users feel about different topics to create strategies that resonate and drive revenue:
Monitor overall user emotions
Dive deeper into sentiments per topic
Track positive and negative reactions
Content Insights
### Understand user reactions to topics
Dive deeper into sentiments with AI-powered recommendations to guide your strategies:
See detailed post summaries
Understand the emotional context
Get tailored recommendations
## Unlock next level insights with GPT-powered research
Take advantage of everything AI has to offer with our GPT-powered conversational research tool to help you understand your users like never before.
Research Prompt
### Get started with a simple question
Ask a question in Research to get personalized answers based on the content your users post:
Type a question to get started
Or use the prompt templates
Set custom date/time for research
Research Result and Chat
### Interactive insights at your fingertips
The research bot analyzes all your posts to generate detailed research reports:
Get personalized community insights
Dig deeper with follow up questions
Download the final reports
Content Reference
### Ground your research in facts
The research bot gives you access to the original user-generated content cited in the research:
Citation and links included in the research
Click to easily see the original content
History display of research questions
## Data-driven decisions made easy
Access all your live engagement data and analytics from one dashboard to stay updated on your community and make agile decisions.
## Social Analytics
### Content Data
Dive into user-generated content on your platform to create better engagement strategies. See how often users posts, their daily habits on your platform, and so much more.
### User Data
Easily see the growth of your community and identify the top voices leading the way. Access all the user data you need from big picture down to individual members.
## Chat Analytics
### Channel Data
Discover which channels your community prefers for communication, how frequently they send messages, and their active times. Compare the data to the previous month to track your growth or refine your engagement strategies.
### User Data
Gain insights into your chat users with detailed statistics and analytics that help you understand key trends and the overall health of your community's communications.
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus goes beyond offering the complete suite of social features to include powerful tools to analyze, moderate, and monetize your in-app communities.
### Maximize your app's revenue potential with social.plus
Discover how to transform user engagement into unparalleled monetization opportunities with social.plus
### Build positive and safe communities
We power moderators with all the necessary tools to control and impose permissions to make your app a safer place for all users.

pages.metaTitle: Moderate User-Generated Content with social.plus
pages.metaDescription: Protect your community with advanced AI moderation.
pages.content:
# Ensure a safe digital space for every user
Elevate user experience with advanced moderation tools, ensuring a vibrant, inclusive, and secure space for all users.
## Moderation Panel
With our Moderation Panel, you can moderate massive amounts of content manually and automatically.
### Equip moderators with the right tools
Easily monitor the environment and save valuable time with automatic and manual moderation capabilities.
### Customize & automate moderation
Automatically filter out profanity and images that contain nudity, violence, suggestive, or disturbing images.
## Protect your community with advanced AI moderation
We use AI for real-time content moderation, creating a safer and more engaging online environment. Our advanced tools detect and manage harmful content seamlessly.
### Pre-Moderation
Automatically review content before it goes live. If the AI confidence score exceeds your set threshold, the content is blocked to protect your community.
### Post-Moderation
Monitor content after it’s published. Based on confidence scores, the system can flag, hide, or remove harmful content without manual intervention.
## Content Moderation
Content moderation is a crucial part of any community to make it a safe space for users. Our tools make it super easy for moderators to track content manually & automatically.
## User Moderation
Content is posted by users, so moderating people is just as important as moderating content. Our tools help your admins and moderators preserve positivity on your platform at all times.
## Administrators & Moderators
Create positive experiences and encourage more engagement on your platform for all members of your community with our administrator & moderator capabilities and customizable user roles.
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus goes beyond offering the complete suite of social features to include powerful tools to analyze, moderate, and monetize your in-app communities.
### Own and analyze your data in real-time
Access and analyze your engagement data in real-time to gain valuable user insights.
### Maximize your app's revenue potential with social.plus
Discover how to transform user engagement into unparalleled monetization opportunities with social.plus

pages.metaTitle: Monetize your App with social.plus
pages.metaDescription: Discover how to transform user engagement into monetization opportunities.
pages.content:
# Maximize your app's revenue potential
Discover how to transform user engagement into unparalleled monetization opportunities with social.plus
## Drive revenue with embedded commerce and tailored campaigns
Integrate direct commerce into your platform, fostering an interactive and transactional social ecosystem.
## Unlock new revenue streams with sponsored partner placements
Partner with brands to leverage your community’s potential, enriching the user experience while boosting your revenue.
Sponsored Groups
### Create win-win partnerships with sponsored groups
Lease spaces to partners with official groups, creating a new revenue stream and enriching your community with fresh content and added credibility.
Drive engagement with partner brands
Increase brand reputation with trusted partners
Enable partners to sell directly through groups
Sponsored Content
### Enable partners to sponsor content
Generate revenue by offering sponsored native placements to your partners. Select partners that align with your audience to maximize revenue potential.
A variety of placement options
Native placements for optimal UX
Manage sponsored content in the social.plus Console
## Make your community exclusive with in-app subscription models
Drive sustainable revenue and offer value through tailored subscription options.
Paid subscriptions
### Make community a part of your subscription model
Include your community in the subscription tiers you offer to encourage user investment in your app's unique experiences and ensure a steady revenue stream.
Subscriber only groups
### Create subscriber-only areas in your community
Build exclusive spaces where subscribers can interact, share, and engage with content not available to the general audience, incentivizing others to join.
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus goes beyond offering the complete suite of social features to include powerful tools to analyze, moderate, and monetize your in-app communities.
### Own and analyze your data in real-time
Access and analyze your engagement data in real-time to gain valuable user insights.
### Build positive and safe communities
We power moderators with all the necessary tools to control and impose permissions to make your app a safer place for all users.

pages.metaTitle: Retail - social.plus for the Retail industry

pages.metaTitle: Live Chat
pages.metaDescription: Live Chat enables audiences to communicate in real time during live video sessions or major moments. Viewers can react, ask questions, and interact with hosts and other participants while the event unfolds. It transforms passive watching into an active, social experience that keeps users engaged for longer.
pages.content:
# Live Chat
Live Chat enables audiences to communicate in real time during live video sessions or major moments. Viewers can react, ask questions, and interact with hosts and other participants while the event unfolds. It transforms passive watching into an active, social experience that keeps users engaged for longer.
## Why use Live Chat?
### Turns viewers into participants
Audiences move from watching to interacting.
### Creates shared excitement
Real-time conversation amplifies emotional moments.
### Increases watch time
Users stay longer when discussion is happening.
## Examples of Live Chats you can build
### Live Shopping Chat
Customers ask about products while watching demos.
### Trainer Q&A Chat
Participants ask coaches questions during sessions.
### Tour or Event Chat
Travelers engage with guides in real time.
### Matchday Fan Chat
Supporters react together during games.
### Instant Reactions
Emoji responses that keep chat moving quickly.
### Real-Time Delivery
Instant communication with online presence, read and delivery receipts.
### Mentions
Notify users when they are tagged in messages.
### Media Sharing
Send images, videos, audio, or files.
### Moderation Controls
Manage participants and maintain safe environments.
### Analytics
Track activity, peak engagement, and user participation.

pages.metaTitle: Group Chat
pages.metaDescription: Group Chat enables real-time communication between many participants in a shared space. Whether users are discussing products, motivating each other during workouts, coordinating travel plans, or reacting to a live match, group conversations create energy and belonging. Everything happens directly inside your app, keeping engagement and data within your ecosystem.
pages.content:
# Group Chat
Group Chat enables real-time communication between many participants in a shared space. Whether users are discussing products, motivating each other during workouts, coordinating travel plans, or reacting to a live match, group conversations create energy and belonging. Everything happens directly inside your app, keeping engagement and data within your ecosystem.
## Why use Group Chat?
### Builds community energy
Real-time conversations make experiences feel alive and shared.
### Increases participation
Users are more likely to contribute when others are active.
### Strengthens retention
Social interaction gives users a reason to return frequently.
## Examples of Group Chats you can build
### Shopping Community Chat
Customers discuss products, drops, and recommendations together.
### Workout Accountability Chat
Members motivate each other and share progress live.
### Trip Coordination Chat
Travelers plan, share updates, and ask questions.
### Fan Match Chat
Supporters react together during games or events.
### Instant Reactions
Emoji responses that keep chat moving quickly.
### Real-Time Delivery
Instant communication with online presence, read and delivery receipts.
### Mentions
Notify users when they are tagged in messages.
### Media Sharing
Send images, videos, audio, or files.
### Moderation Controls
Manage participants and maintain safe environments.
### Analytics
Track activity, peak engagement, and user participation.

pages.metaTitle: 1-1 Chat
pages.metaDescription: 1-1 Chat allows two users to communicate privately inside your app. It is ideal for support, coaching, consultations, or personal interaction between community members. Instead of pushing users to third-party messaging platforms, you keep conversations, engagement, and data within your ecosystem.
pages.content:
# 1-1 Chat
1-1 Chat allows two users to communicate privately inside your app. It is ideal for support, coaching, consultations, or personal interaction between community members. Instead of pushing users to third-party messaging platforms, you keep conversations, engagement, and data within your ecosystem.
## Why use 1-1 Chat?
### Builds stronger relationships
Direct communication creates trust and loyalty.
### Reduces friction
Users get help or advice instantly without leaving your app.
### Keeps data in your ecosystem
Conversations, intent, and outcomes stay connected to your platform.
## Examples of 1-1 Chats you can build
### Shopper Assistance Chat
Direct conversation between customers and brand representatives.
### Coach Messaging
Personal guidance between coaches and clients.
### Travel Support Chat
Travelers connect with agents or hosts.
### Fan to Athlete or Club Chat
Controlled private interactions or VIP access.
### Instant Reactions
Emoji responses that keep chat moving quickly.
### Real-Time Delivery
Instant communication with online presence, read and delivery receipts.
### Media Sharing
Send images, videos, audio, or files.
### Push Notifications
Alert users to new messages immediately.
### User Controls
Block, report, or manage conversations.
### Analytics
Track engagement and responsiveness.

pages.metaTitle: Custom Posts
pages.metaDescription: Custom Posts let you create specialized content types beyond standard text, image, or video posts. Each custom post is powered by structured data, giving you full control over what data is stored and how it is rendered. This makes Custom Posts ideal for use cases like product reviews, fitness activities, travel logs, or any experience that requires consistent structure and custom UI.
pages.content:
# Custom Posts
Custom Posts let you create specialized content types beyond standard text, image, or video posts. Each custom post is powered by structured data, giving you full control over what data is stored and how it is rendered. This makes Custom Posts ideal for use cases like product reviews, fitness activities, travel logs, or any experience that requires consistent structure and custom UI.
## Why use Custom Posts?
### Supports structured experiences
Capture rich, consistent data instead of unstructured text.
### Unlocks custom UI and logic
Render posts exactly how your product needs them.
### Scales across industries and use cases
One system supports many specialized content types.
## Examples of custom posts you can build
### Product Review Posts
Structured reviews with ratings, pros, cons, and tagged products.
### Activity & Run Posts
Detailed workout or run summaries with distance, pace, and time.
### Trip Log Posts
Travel entries with locations, photos, and highlights.
### Match & Performance Posts
Structured updates for match stats or player performance.
### Flexible Schema
Define your own data structure using structured JSON.
### Custom Rendering
Control exactly how each post type appears in your app.
### Rich Metadata
Store complex data such as ratings, stats, or locations.
### Large Payload Support
Handle up to 100KB of custom structured data per post.
### Feed Compatibility
Custom posts work seamlessly inside feeds and groups.
### Analytics
Track engagement and performance per post type.

pages.metaTitle: Polls
pages.metaDescription: Polls are quick, interactive questions that let users share opinions with a single tap. They lower the barrier to participation, making it easy for users to engage without writing comments or posts, turning passive audiences into active participants.
pages.content:
# Polls
Polls are quick, interactive questions that let users share opinions with a single tap. They lower the barrier to participation, making it easy for users to engage without writing comments or posts, turning passive audiences into active participants.
## Why use Polls?
### Drives instant participation
Voting is fast, simple, and accessible to everyone.
### Generates real insights
Polls reveal preferences, intent, and sentiment at scale.
### Keeps communities active
Regular questions create reasons to return and engage.
## Examples of polls you can build
### Product Preference Polls
Ask users to vote on styles, features, or upcoming products.
### Wellness Check-In Polls
Quick questions about mood, energy, or habits.
### Trip Planning Polls
Vote on destinations, activities, or itineraries.
### Match Prediction Polls
Fans predict outcomes or key moments.
### Poll Questions
Create posts with questions that have multiple answers.
### Real-Time Results
Show live vote counts and percentages.
### Flexible Placement
Embed polls in feeds or livestreams.
### Permissions
Control who can create and vote in polls.
### Engagement Signals
Boost interaction without requiring comments.
### Analytics
Understand participation rates and preferences.

pages.metaTitle: Stories & Clips
pages.metaDescription: Stories and Clips are short-form content formats designed for fast consumption and high engagement. Stories are typically ephemeral and time-bound, while Clips are short, scrollable videos built for continuous discovery. Together, they give users expressive tools to share moments, highlight experiences, and consume content in a dynamic, visual way inside your app.
pages.content:
# Stories & Clips
Stories and Clips are short-form content formats designed for fast consumption and high engagement. Stories are typically ephemeral and time-bound, while Clips are short, scrollable videos built for continuous discovery. Together, they give users expressive tools to share moments, highlight experiences, and consume content in a dynamic, visual way inside your app.
## Why use Stories & Clips?
### Captures attention quickly
Short-form content fits modern user behavior and reduces friction to engage.
### Encourages user expression
Stories and Clips lower the barrier to sharing moments and creativity.
### Drives discovery and retention
Visual formats keep users exploring, watching, and returning.
## Examples of stories and clips you can build
### Product Showcase Clips
Short videos highlighting products, features, or drops.
### Workout Clips
Bite-sized exercise demos or training moments.
### Trip Highlight Stories
Ephemeral stories capturing travel moments and experiences.
### Highlight & Replay Clips
Short replays of key moments, goals, or plays.
### Stories
Ephemeral photo and video updates that expire after a set time.
### Clips
Short, vertical videos optimized for continuous discovery.
### Profiles
Stories and clips are tied to user profiles for identity and followability.
### Reactions
Quick emojis and lightweight interactions.
### Comments and Replies 
Direct responses that keep conversations flowing.
### Analytics
Measure views, completion rates, and engagement.

pages.metaTitle: Live Stream
pages.metaDescription: Live Stream enables real-time video broadcasting directly inside your app. Hosts can go live while audiences watch, react, and engage through chat and interactions. Whether used for commerce, fitness, entertainment, or events, livestreams create urgency, authenticity, and a strong sense of connection between hosts and viewers.
pages.content:
# Live Stream
Live Stream enables real-time video broadcasting directly inside your app. Hosts can go live while audiences watch, react, and engage through chat and interactions. Whether used for commerce, fitness, entertainment, or events, livestreams create urgency, authenticity, and a strong sense of connection between hosts and viewers.
## Why use livestream?
### Creates real-time engagement
Live video captures attention and encourages immediate interaction.
### Builds trust and authenticity
Live moments feel more personal and less scripted than recorded content.
### Drives action in the moment
Viewers are more likely to participate, comment, or purchase during live sessions.
## Examples of livestreams you can build
### Livestream Shopping
Live product demos with real-time questions and purchase prompts.
### Workout Livestreams
Trainers host live workout sessions with audience participation.
### Experience Livestreams
Stream tours, events, or moments from destinations.
### Match Livestreams
Broadcast games or matches with fan interaction.
### Live Video Streaming
High-quality real-time video delivery inside your app.
### Live Chat
Instant messaging for viewers to interact during the stream.
### Reactions
Lightweight emojis to express excitement or support.
### Host Controls
Start, pause, end streams, and manage interactions.
### Moderation Tools
Mute users, remove messages, or control visibility.
### Analytics
Measure viewer count, engagement, and stream performance.

pages.metaTitle: Groups
pages.metaDescription: Groups and forums give your community structure. Instead of one endless feed, users can join topic-based spaces where conversations stay relevant and easy to follow. From interest groups and support forums to brand communities and internal teams, groups help users connect with the right people around the right topics.
pages.content:
# Groups
Groups and forums give your community structure. Instead of one endless feed, users can join topic-based spaces where conversations stay relevant and easy to follow. From interest groups and support forums to brand communities and internal teams, groups help users connect with the right people around the right topics.
## Why use groups?
### Keeps conversations organized
Topic-based spaces make it easier to find and follow relevant discussions.
### Builds stronger sub-communities
Smaller, focused groups increase participation and trust.
### Scales community growth
Groups allow your community to expand without losing clarity or relevance.
## Examples of groups you can build
### Product Discovery Groups
Communities where members share recommendations, reviews, and product finds within specific categories.
### Nutrition & Wellness Groups
Supportive spaces for users to discuss habits, goals, recipes, and progress together.
### Destination Groups
Groups organized around cities, trips, or regions for tips, itineraries, and shared experiences.
### Fan Club Groups
Dedicated spaces for fans to connect, discuss teams or athletes, and celebrate moments together.
### Groups
Dedicated spaces organized by topic or purpose.
### Posts
Create topics, ask questions, and share updates.
### Comments and replies
Structured conversations that are easy to follow.
### Reactions
Likes and emojis that encourage participation.
### Roles and permissions
Control who can post, moderate, or manage groups.
### Analytics
Track group activity, engagement, and growth.

pages.metaTitle: User Profiles
pages.metaDescription: User Profiles are the identity layer of your app. They give every user a personal space to show who they are, what they care about, and how they participate in the community. Profiles connect all social features, including feeds, chats, groups, and content, into a cohesive experience centered around the user.
pages.content:
# User Profiles
User Profiles are the identity layer of your app. They give every user a personal space to show who they are, what they care about, and how they participate in the community. Profiles connect all social features, including feeds, chats, groups, and content, into a cohesive experience centered around the user.
## Why use User Profiles?
### Builds identity and belonging
Users are more likely to engage when they feel seen and recognized.
### Connects activity across the app
Profiles unify posts, comments, and interactions in one place.
### Enables personalization
Interests and behavior help tailor feeds, content, and experiences.
## Examples of user profiles you can build
### Influencer Profiles
Profiles that highlight influencer content, partnerships, and product recommendations.
### Coach Profiles
Professional profiles for trainers or experts sharing guidance, programs, and progress.
### Content Creator Profiles
Profiles showcasing stories, clips, and posts from creators sharing experiences and tips.
### Athlete Profiles
Fan-facing profiles for athletes featuring stats, updates, and community interaction.
### Profile pages
Personal spaces with avatar, bio, and key details.
### Timeline feed
A timeline of posts, comments, and interactions.
### Interests and tags
User-selected topics for personalization.
### Connections
Follow or connect with other users.
### Privacy controls
Manage who can see profile information.
### Analytics
Understand profile views and engagement.

pages.metaTitle: Activity Feed
pages.metaDescription: The Activity Feed is the foundation of in-app community. It’s a real-time stream of posts, updates, and conversations where users can share content, react, and engage with each other. Whether used for community discussions, product updates, or social discovery, the Activity Feed becomes the heartbeat of your app experience.
pages.content:
# Activity Feed
The Activity Feed is the foundation of in-app community. It’s a real-time stream of posts, updates, and conversations where users can share content, react, and engage with each other. Whether used for community discussions, product updates, or social discovery, the Activity Feed becomes the heartbeat of your app experience.
## Why use an Activity Feed?
### Drives habitual engagement
Feeds encourage repeat visits by always giving users something new to explore.
### Creates a shared space
Users engage not just with content, but with each other, building belonging.
### Scales across use cases
One feed can power communities, commerce, events, and communication.
## Examples of activity feeds you can build
### Shoppable Feed
A community feed where posts include tagged products for discovery and purchase.
### Progress Feed
A feed focused on tracking workouts, habits, or milestones shared by users.
### Travel Journal Feed
A storytelling feed where users share trips, check-ins, and experiences.
### Exclusive Team Feeds
Private feeds for teams, clubs, or fan groups to share updates and moments.
### Posts
Create rich content with text, images, or video.
### Reactions
Likes and emojis that drive lightweight engagement.
### Comments
Threaded discussions directly under posts.
### Profiles
User identities tied to every interaction.
### Moderation
Control visibility, reporting, and content quality.
### Analytics
Understand engagement, activity trends, and participation.
